# ZXing web runtime

`index.min.js` is the MIT-licensed `@zxing/library` 0.21.3 UMD runtime used by
`mobile_scanner` on web. It is vendored so the deployed client keeps a
self-only script CSP and does not execute scanner code from a CDN at runtime.

- Source: `https://unpkg.com/@zxing/library@0.21.3/umd/index.min.js`
- SHA-256: `d7cc8f69dd70bdcf3ac00c9ae572bf2acb9f4132ba379c72df842e4db918652d`
- Upstream license: `LICENSE`
